verse_text: till we all come to the unity of the faith and of the knowledge of the Son of God, to a perfect man, to the measure of the stature of the fullness of Christ;

pericope.title: Put Off the Old, Put On the New

links.context: The summary statement of all that has preceded. The Christian can indeed grow in the perfection of the Father ([[EPH.4:13]]; see also the article, "Deification," at 2Pt 1), which is shown by imitating His love and mercy (compare [[LUK.6:36]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
